mission.title: Install and Configure Hwameistor on Kubernetes
mission.description: Hwameistor is an HA local storage system designed for cloud-native stateful workloads. It enables the creation of a local storage resource pool for managing various disk types, providing data persistence capabilities for applications.

resolution.summary: A successful installation will have the Hwameistor pods running in the 'hwameistor' namespace, and you will see them listed when running `kubectl get pods --namespace hwameistor`. Additionally, the ServiceMonitor will be set up for monitoring.

troubleshooting.title: Insufficient Resources
troubleshooting.description: If you encounter issues related to insufficient resources, ensure your cluster has enough CPU and memory allocated for the Hwameistor components.

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a running Kubernetes cluster and kubectl installed and configured to interact with your cluster.
